abilities.name: Activate

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

abilities.trigger: You hit a creature with the affixed weapon.

stat_block.text: This delicate dawnsilver chain strung with tiny shuriken is wound tightly around the handle of the affixed weapon. When you Activate the chain, three *+1 striking shuriken* made from magical force materialize in the target’s space and split off to attack other creatures. Attempt up to three shuriken Strikes that must each target a different creature and can’t target the creature you hit to trigger this talisman. These Strikes use your attack modifier but originate from the hit creature’s space. These attacks count toward your multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn’t increase until after all three attacks have been made. The shuriken deal force damage instead of their normal type, and each shuriken vanishes after its attack.

traits.name: Consumable
traits.text: An item with this trait can be used only once. Unless stated otherwise, it’s destroyed after activation. Consumable items include alchemical items and magical consumables such as scrolls and talismans. A character can Craft consumable items in batches of four.

traits.name: Force
traits.text: Effects with this trait deal force damage or create objects made of pure magical force.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

traits.name: Talisman
traits.text: A talisman is a small object affixed to armor, a shield, or a weapon (called the affixed item). You must be wielding or wearing an item to activate a talisman attached to it. Once activated, a talisman burns out permanently.
